{{Infobox artifact
| name = Penance prototype
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] left prototypes of [[Penance]] scattered throughout the world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Three [[Penance]] prototypes were hidden in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Penance prototype]] is tipped with a curved black triangle with a sharp [[steel]] edge and emanates death [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
